overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, likely from Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks along a wet elevated sidewalk past palm trees toward a towering neon-lit skyscraper, briefly glances at a fenced plaza with distant neon lights, then continues into a highway underpass. The scene features heavy rain, reflective wet surfaces, and a distinctive greenish-teal color grade.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront highway sidewalk with palm tree landscaping

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk next to a multi-lane highway, passing modern angled glass structures and palm trees with a towering neon-lit skyscraper visible ahead

entered.detail: tall cylindrical tower with vertical neon signage rising into the stormy night sky
multi-lane wet asphalt road with yellow dividing line and street lighting
rain-slicked concrete pedestrian walkway with reflective puddles
modern angled glass panels or wind shields mounted on the barrier wall
tall palm tree silhouetted against the city lights and rain
tall pole-mounted lights illuminating the highway with warm glow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked elevated sidewalk alongside a highway at night. The camera moves forward past modern glass architectural elements and palm trees, with a massive neon-lit skyscraper dominating the distant skyline. Street lights cast reflections on the wet concrete as heavy rain continues to fall.

events.description: camera turns sharply to the right to look over the fence at the plaza below
camera turns back to face forward along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: briefly turning to observe the fenced plaza area with distant neon lights and buildings before resuming forward progress

entered.detail: black metal safety fence overlooking the lower plaza area
distant buildings with glowing neon signs visible through the rain and fog

segments.scene_description: While continuing to walk, the camera turns right to reveal a fenced overlook of a lower plaza with glowing neon signs and buildings in the distance. The palm trees and mega tower shift to the left side of the frame during the turn before the view returns to the forward path.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass approach with digital billboards

events.description: environment becomes more enclosed as the overpass structure looms ahead
entering the dark tunnel underpass beneath the highway

agents.ego_description: walking toward and into the concrete underpass, passing beneath large digital billboards displaying vehicle advertisements

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with support columns spanning the road
large illuminated advertising screens mounted on the overpass showing vehicle commercials
dark tunnel entrance leading under the highway with artificial lighting inside

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a concrete highway underpass with large digital billboards displaying car advertisements overhead. The environment transitions from the open rain to the sheltered tunnel entrance. The neon skyscraper remains visible ahead through the gloom as the camera enters the dark underpass, with the wet sidewalk continuing into the tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-slicked elevated sidewalk that transitions from an open, neon-lit cityscape into the sheltered gloom of a highway underpass. It begins by gliding past modern glass architecture and palm trees, with a massive neon skyscraper dominating the distant skyline under a heavy downpour. As the camera moves forward, it briefly pivots right to reveal a fenced overlook of a glowing lower plaza before swinging back to the main path. The scene then shifts toward a concrete underpass where large digital car advertisements loom overhead, marking the transition from the open rain to a covered environment. Finally, the camera enters the dark tunnel, with the distant glow of the skyscraper still visible through the haze as the wet sidewalk disappears into the shadows.
